hero.headline: I build fast and professional landing pages for your business to attract more clients
hero.subhead: I handle everything for you — from development to bringing your site online, without the hassle.
about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm Henrique. I build fast, simple websites for companies starting out online, while taking care of all the heavy-lifting technical work in the background.
about.s1.title: Landing Pages
about.s1.desc: Simple, fast and professional pages designed to convert leads.
about.s2.title: Domain & Publishing
about.s2.desc: I help you choose your domain name and bring it online. You don't have to worry about the setup.
about.s3.title: Performance & Security
about.s3.desc: Your site will run under enterprise-grade architecture, extremely fast and secure.
how.title: How I work
how.perf.title: Lightning Fast
how.perf.desc: Slow websites lose money. I build extremely lightweight internet pages that load instantly everywhere.
how.sec.title: Headache Proof
how.sec.desc: Your brand safe from common flaws, automated hacks, and frustrating downtime.
how.scale.title: Always Online
how.scale.desc: Deployed over professional infrastructure so you can rest assured it's always running smoothly.
